apis.name: notificationManager (NotificationManager)
apis.purpose: Notification management: publish, cancel, manage channels, query enabled status, request permission, set badges

apis.name: notification.request/publish
apis.purpose: Publish a notification to the system notification panel (deprecated old API; use notificationManager.publish instead)

apis.name: notificationWant (Agent)
apis.purpose: WantAgent for notification click actions — triggers target ability when user taps a notification

apis.name: Want
apis.purpose: Information transfer carrier between application components (abilityName, bundleName, parameters, URI, etc.)

apis.name: reminderAgent (reminder notification)
apis.purpose: Background agent-powered reminders: countdown timer, calendar, and alarm types, managed by system service when app is frozen or exited

notableFindings: notificationManager is the recommended module (API 9+); @ohos.notification is deprecated since API 9
reminderAgentManager replaces the deprecated @ohos.reminderAgent module since API 9
notificationWant refers to WantAgent used in notification click actions — import from @kit.AbilityKit
Reminder publishing requires ohos.permission.PUBLISH_AGENT_REMINDER and notification must be enabled first
Want data is limited to 200KB (API 23+) / 100KB (API 22) due to IPC constraints
